base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_5_3_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Tree-top / sky-platforms. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tree-top / sky-platforms; identical structure to 1-3 with flying-Koopas more dense.
